title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Poojara Telecom

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Poojara Telecom
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!
